SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_consum FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment='SME'),0) -
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_consum FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment='LAM'),0) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_consum FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment='LAM'),0) -
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_consum FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment='KAM'),0) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_consum FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment='KAM'),0) -
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_consum FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment='SME'),0) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
  WITH cust_consum AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
  ),
  min_consum AS (
    SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consum
    FROM cust_consum cc
    JOIN customers c ON cc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  ),
  filtered AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, cc.total_consumption
    FROM cust_consum cc
    JOIN customers c ON cc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    JOIN min_consum mc ON cc.total_consumption = mc.min_consum
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  ),
  avg_per_seg AS (
    SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consum
    FROM filtered
    GROUP BY Segment
  )
  SELECT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment, GrowthPercent
FROM (
    SELECT a.Segment,
           ((b.total - a.total) / a.total) * 100.0 AS GrowthPercent
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS year,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, year
    ) a
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS year,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, year
    ) b ON a.Segment = b.Segment
    WHERE a.year = '2012' AND b.year = '2013'
) t
ORDER BY GrowthPercent DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, GrowthPercent
FROM (
    SELECT a.Segment,
           ((b.total - a.total) / a.total) * 100.0 AS GrowthPercent
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS year,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, year
    ) a
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS year,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, year
    ) b ON a.Segment = b.Segment
    WHERE a.year = '2012' AND b.year = '2013'
) t
ORDER BY GrowthPercent ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH client_age AS (
    SELECT client_id,
           julianday('now') - julianday(birth_date) AS age_days
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
max_age AS (
    SELECT MAX(age_days) AS max_age FROM client_age
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT ca.client_id
    FROM client_age ca
    JOIN max_age ma ON ca.age_days = ma.max_age
),
client_accounts AS (
    SELECT d.client_id, d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN oldest_females f ON d.client_id = f.client_id
),
account_avg AS (
    SELECT t.account_id, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_income
    FROM trans t
    GROUP BY t.account_id
),
min_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_income) AS min_avg
    FROM account_avg
    WHERE account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM client_accounts)
),
max_avg AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_income) AS max_avg
    FROM account_avg
)
SELECT ca.account_id,
       (ma.max_avg - mi.min_avg) AS diff
FROM client_accounts ca
JOIN account_avg aa ON ca.account_id = aa.account_id
JOIN min_avg mi ON aa.avg_income = mi.min_avg
JOIN max_avg ma ON 1=1;	----- bird -----	financial
